title: Silky Lentil Curry
description: A flavorful and comforting Indian-inspired lentil curry made with silky and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, tomato, and silky, and stir to combine.
Add enough water to cover the lentils and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro, if desired.
Note: This curry can be made in a pressure cooker for faster cooking time.
